name: garmin-dashboard
description: Local Whoop-style recovery dashboard sourced from Garmin Connect.

scripts.build:backend: .venv/Scripts/python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --onedir --name garmin-backend --distpath pybuild/dist --workpath pybuild/build --specpath pybuild --collect-all garminconnect --collect-all curl_cffi --collect-all ua_generator --collect-data certifi --collect-submodules backend server_main.py
scripts.dist: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --win
